calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kurt Miller, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc., dba Yellow Cab Company.
Adnan Atallah, Shop Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Hui Shi Xiang.
Default entered against defendant on February 14, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on May 14, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc., dba Yellow Cab Company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Hui Shi Xiang as follows:

Damages/Principal - $9,744.01.
Costs - $265.00, for a total of $10,009.01.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
